creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Looks like you have a Broken Portstree, works here fine, 

[12:57] root@miwi /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/shells/mksh# make install 
clean ===>  Installing for mksh-r32 ===>   Generating temporary packing 
list ===>  Checking if shells/mksh already installed install  -s -o root 
-g wheel -m 555 /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/shells/mksh/work/mk sh/mksh 
/usr/local/bin /bin/mkdir -p /usr/local/share/examples/mksh install  -o 
root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/shells/mksh/work/mksh/ 
dot.mkshrc /usr/local/share/examples/mksh install  -o root -g wheel -m 
444 /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/shells/mksh/work/mksh/ mksh.1 
/usr/local/man/man1 ===>   Compressing manual pages for mksh-r32 ===> 
Registering installation for mksh-r32 ===>  Cleaning for mksh-r32 

[12:59] root@miwi /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/shells/mksh# cat /etc/shells 
# $FreeBSD: src/etc/shells,v 1.5 2000/04/27 21:58:46 ache Exp $ # # List 
of acceptable shells for chpass(1).  # Ftpd will not allow users to 
connect who are not using # one of these shells. 

/bin/sh /bin/csh /bin/tcsh /usr/local/bin/zsh /usr/local/bin/bash 
/usr/local/bin/rbash /usr/local/bin/mksh 


Could you please checkout a new tree and do a new install of this port? 

Thanks Martin
